name_en: Yabe Family Inscribed Stone Stupa
description_en: An inscribed stone stupa (itabi) of the Yabe family, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1992-03-16. It is located in Naka-Tanadare, Kazo City.

name_en: Memorial Tablet of Ōkubo Tadatsune, Lord of Kisai Castle
description_en: A memorial tablet (ihai) of Ōkubo Tadatsune, lord of Kisai Castle, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1992-03-16. It is located at Ushijū 1713, Kazo City.

name_en: Ten Realms Mandala of Myōkō-ji
description_en: A Ten Realms (Jikkai) mandala of Myōkō-ji, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1992-03-16. It is located at Ushijū 1713, Kazo City.

name_en: Oyama Family Public Notice Board (Kōsatsu)
description_en: A public notice board (kōsatsu) of the Oyama family, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1992-03-16. It is located in Zuiki, Kazo City.

name_en: Kama-dokkae Rite of Suwa Shrine
description_en: The Kama-dokkae rite of Suwa Shrine, classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1992-03-16. It is located at Kami-Takayanagi 52, Kazo City.

name_en: Bonden Festival
description_en: The Bonden festival, classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1992-03-16. It is located at Shōnō 8-4, Kazo City.

name_en: Urushibara Family Documents
description_en: Historical documents of the Urushibara family, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located in Sotodagaya, Kazo City.

name_en: Matsunaga Family Documents
description_en: Historical documents of the Matsunaga family, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located in Nakanome, Kazo City.

name_en: Kurokawa Family Documents
description_en: Historical documents of the Kurokawa family, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located in Ushijū, Kazo City.

name_en: Sixteen-Plate Ridged Helmet (Suji-kabuto)
description_en: A sixteen-plate ridged helmet (suji-kabuto), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located at Kisai 36-1, Kazo City.

name_en: Mathematical Votive Tablet (Sangaku) of Iō-ji
description_en: A mathematical votive tablet (sangaku) of Iō-ji, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located at Zuiki 350, Kazo City.

name_en: Votive Plaque of the Joseon Envoy Procession at Iō-ji
description_en: A votive plaque (ema) depicting a Joseon (Korean) envoy procession, held at Iō-ji, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located at Zuiki 350, Kazo City.

name_romaji: Shōkō sendatsu Fuji tozan jōju kinenhi
name_en: Monument Commemorating the Completion of a Mount Fuji Pilgrimage by a Confraternity Leader
description_en: A stone monument commemorating the completion of a Mount Fuji ascent by a confraternity leader (sendatsu), classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located at Shōnō 200, Kazo City.

name_en: Memorial Pagoda for Flood Victims of the Second Year of Kanpō
description_en: A memorial pagoda (kuyōtō) for flood victims, dated the second year of Kanpō, designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located at Nakanome 946, Kazo City.

name_romaji: Tenpō kunen mei Hideyasu-mura fujoden kinenhi
name_en: Monument of the Hideyasu Village Relief Rice-Field, Inscribed the Ninth Year of Tenpō
description_en: A commemorative monument of the Hideyasu village relief rice-field, bearing an inscription of the ninth year of Tenpō, designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 2004-03-08. It is located at Hideyasu 970, Kazo City.

name_romaji: Itae chakushoku Tonegawa kerēpu kōji zu
name_en: Colored Panel Painting of Tone River Revetment (Kerēpu) Construction
description_en: A colored panel painting depicting revetment (kerēpu) construction on the Tone River, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1977-03-16. It is located in Hongō Kotanmae, Kazo City.

name_en: Monument to the Elder Suzuki Kōkaku
description_en: A stone monument to the elder Suzuki Kōkaku, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1980-03-05. It is located in Mugikura Hosoma, Kazo City.

name_romaji: Watarasegawa Jūsuke uragogan kō no zu
name_en: Painting of Jūsuke's Rear Revetment Work on the Watarase River
description_en: A painting depicting Jūsuke's rear revetment work on the Watarase River, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1981-03-09. It is located in Sakae Nishikande, Kazo City.

name_en: Colored Panel Painting of a Standing Courtesan
description_en: A colored panel painting of a standing courtesan, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1977-03-16. It is located in Iizumi Shin'yashiki, Kazo City.

name_en: Painting of Worship at the Kannon Hall
description_en: A painting depicting worship at a Kannon hall, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1981-03-09. It is located in Iizumi Shin'yashiki, Kazo City.

name_en: Painting of Futamigaura on the Ise Confraternity Pilgrimage
description_en: A painting of Futamigaura made during an Ise confraternity (Ise-kō) pilgrimage, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1981-03-09. It is located in Iizumi Honmura, Kazo City.

name_en: Coffered-Ceiling Panel Paintings of the Outer Sanctuary of Jigen-ji
description_en: Coffered-ceiling panel paintings from the outer sanctuary (gejin) of Jigen-ji, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1981-03-09. It is located in Mugikura Nakakōchi, Kazo City.

name_en: Colored Panel Painting of Calligraphy Practice
description_en: A colored panel painting depicting calligraphy practice (tenarai), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1983-03-21. It is located in Mukōkoga Kitadōri, Kazo City.

name_en: Colored Panel Painting of Calligraphy Practice
description_en: A colored panel painting depicting calligraphy practice (tenarai), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1984-03-21. It is located in Mukōkoga Kitadōri, Kazo City.

name_en: Ink Painting by Tanaka Shōzō (Hanging Scroll, Ink on Paper)
description_en: An ink painting by Tanaka Shōzō, mounted as a hanging scroll in ink on paper, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1988-03-25. It is located in Onobukuro, Kazo City.

name_en: Painting of the Buddha's Nirvana (Nehan)
description_en: A painting of the Buddha's nirvana (nehan), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1989-12-26. It is located in Sakae Nishinaka, Kazo City.

name_en: Colored Panel Painting of Calligraphy Practice
description_en: A colored panel painting depicting calligraphy practice (tenarai), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1989-12-26. It is located in Mukōkoga Kitadōri, Kazo City.

name_en: Three Hanging Scrolls of Guardian-Deity (Zuishin) Paintings
description_en: A set of three hanging scrolls depicting guardian deities (zuishin), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1996-10-01. It is located in Sakae Kande, Kazo City.

name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of Yakushi Nyorai
description_en: A standing wooden statue of Yakushi Nyorai, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1973-12-04. It is located in Onobukuro Nakaakuto, Kazo City.

name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of Shō-Kannon Bosatsu
description_en: A standing wooden statue of Shō-Kannon Bosatsu, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1973-12-04. It is located in Iizumi Shin'yashiki, Kazo City.

description_en: A standing wooden statue of Bishamonten, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1977-03-16. It is located in Hongō Kotanmae, Kazo City.

description_en: A seated wooden statue of Dainichi Nyorai, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1978-03-30. It is located in Iizumi Yamagoshi, Kazo City.

description_en: A seated wooden statue of Amida Nyorai, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1978-03-30. It is located in Onobukuro Fujihata, Kazo City.

name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of Fudō Myōō
description_en: A standing wooden statue of Fudō Myōō, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1978-03-30. It is located in Iizumi Honmura, Kazo City.

description_en: A seated wooden statue of Yakushi Nyorai, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1988-12-26. It is located in Onobukuro Fujihata, Kazo City.

name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Kōgyō Daishi
description_en: A seated wooden statue of Kōgyō Daishi, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1988-12-26. It is located in Onobukuro Fujihata, Kazo City.

name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Kōbō Daishi
description_en: A seated wooden statue of Kōbō Daishi, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1988-12-26. It is located in Onobukuro Fujihata, Kazo City.

name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of Fudō Myōō
description_en: A standing wooden statue of Fudō Myōō, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1988-12-26. It is located in Onobukuro Fujihata, Kazo City.

description_en: A standing wooden statue of Karura-ō (the Garuda king), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated in Kazo City and was designated on 1989-12-26. It is located in Hongō Tanmae, Kazo City.
